basics.appDescription: The Prime Way is a personal productivity and habit tracking app that helps you stay organized and motivated.

exampleData.outcomeDescription: Train consistently to complete a full 42K marathon within 12 months.

examples.title: Try asking about:

examples.finance: How do I save more money?

chat.emptyDescription: Your companion to reach your Prime State. Ask me about your vision, finances, tasks, or productivity.
chat.proposalRejectedSystem: User rejected the proposal. Ask if they want to modify something.

ai.comingSoon: AI chat coming soon! Connect your backend to enable this feature.

suggestions.vision: I want to create my personal vision
suggestions.todayTasks: What are my tasks for today?

proposal.warning: This action will modify your data. Review the details before confirming.
proposal.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete the vision and ALL its pillars, outcomes, and quarterly focuses. This action cannot be undone.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and data
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
deleteAccount.consequence1: All your tasks, habits, and goals will be lost.
deleteAccount.consequence2: Your profile information will be deleted.
deleteAccount.consequence3: You will lose access to all premium features.
deleteAccount.successDescription: Your account has been successfully deleted.
deleteAccount.errorDescription: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

tooltips.goals: Choose the life areas that matter most to you. These become your Pillars — the foundation for all your goals and habits.
tooltips.habits: Habits are daily or weekly actions that compound over time. Start with one small habit and build from there.
tooltips.tasks: Tasks are one-time actions with deadlines. Capture what you need to do so nothing falls through the cracks.
tooltips.finances: Track your money across accounts, budgets, and savings goals. Start by setting your currency and first account.

goals.description: Start by defining what you want to achieve.
